name: Gambing & Risk Taking conference at Bellagio adds new keynote speakers
summary: The 19th International Conference on Gambling & Risk Taking set for this month has added new keynote and panel presentations spanning sports betting, artificial intelligence, regulatory oversight and risk in the entertainment industry.

name: PoliticsNevada Is Losing Out On $80 Million In Annual Revenue By Separating The Marijuana And Gaming Industries, Report Finds
summary: At the University of Nevada Las Vegas (UNLV) Cannabis Policy Institute and International Gaming Institute’s 3rd Annual Gaming & Cannabis Policy Discussion late last month, lawmakers and officials discussed the impact of regulations that have kept the licensed marijuana industry from fully integrating with the state’s storied gaming sector.

name: OnlyFans’ First-Gen Creators Are Retiring—and Some Are Begging You to Forget They Exist
summary: As more sex workers quit the industry, some are having to navigate tough questions around consent and the “afterlife” of work they no longer want to be associated with.

name: AirTalk | The Las Vegas Sphere’s immersive experience
summary: The venue that was created as a new form of live entertainment has become the highest grossing arena in the world. Since its opening three years ago, the Sphere has offered the residencies of legendary bands such as the Eagles, U2 and Phish. More Sphere-like arenas are coming. So what does the future hold for immersive tech and entertainment?

name: SBC Summit Americas to Introduce Interactive Industry Masterclasses
summary: The masterclass “Betting on Influence: An Analysis of Sports Betting Influencers” will teach sportsbook operators how to use influencer marketing in a responsible and effective way.

name: Las Vegas medical district housing project aims to address healthcare worker shortage
summary: City officials say affordable units will help retain doctors, nurses and students as southern Nevada faces staffing gap
